day4_lunch_start.name: Me
day4_lunch_start.text: *Lunchtime. Yuna's empty seat keeps drawing my eyes.*

day4_lunch_start_2.name: Me
day4_lunch_start_2.text: *I can't believe she 'transferred out'. She was here just yesterday.*

day4_lunch_search_yuna.name: Me
day4_lunch_search_yuna.text: *I wander the corridors. The places Yuna frequented... the photography club room.*

day4_lunch_search_2.name: Me
day4_lunch_search_2.text: *The photography club room is open. Nobody inside.*

day4_lunch_search_3.name: Me
day4_lunch_search_3.text: *Yuna's locker. I opened it. Empty... except for one thing.*

day4_lunch_search_4.name: Me
day4_lunch_search_4.text: *A small camera. Hidden in the corner of the locker. Yuna must have left it behind.*

day4_lunch_search_5.name: Me
day4_lunch_search_5.text: *I pocketed the camera. ...Footsteps in the corridor, suddenly.*

day4_lunch_search_6.name: Me
day4_lunch_search_6.text: *I looked back. Someone was standing at the end of the hall... then vanished. I hurried back to class.*

day4_lunch_nurse.name: Kang Riin
day4_lunch_nurse.text: "Oh my, {name}. Back again. What hurts today?"

day4_lunch_nurse_2.name: Me
day4_lunch_nurse_2.text: *A locked cabinet in the corner of the nurse's office. It has a padlock that wasn't there before.*

day4_lunch_nurse_3.name: Kang Riin
day4_lunch_nurse_3.text: "How was the drink from yesterday? ...Are you sleeping well?"

day4_lunch_nurse_3_alt.name: Kang Riin
day4_lunch_nurse_3_alt.text: "Have you been sleeping well lately? You look a bit tired."

day4_lunch_nurse_confront.name: Kang Riin
day4_lunch_nurse_confront.text: "Yuna? ...Oh, that girl. They said she transferred, didn't they?"

day4_lunch_nurse_confront_2.name: Kang Riin
day4_lunch_nurse_confront_2.text: "...Why are you looking at me like that? {name}, you're not thinking something strange, are you?"

day4_lunch_nurse_pretend.name: Me
day4_lunch_nurse_pretend.text: *I said nothing. Riin smiled and offered me a vitamin.*

day4_lunch_nurse_pretend_2.name: Kang Riin
day4_lunch_nurse_pretend_2.text: "Here, a vitamin. ...Please take it this time?"

day4_lunch_rooftop.name: Me
day4_lunch_rooftop.text: *The rooftop. Where I was with Yuna yesterday. The wind is cold.*

day4_lunch_rooftop_2.name: Me
day4_lunch_rooftop_2.text: *Something is carved under the railing. Letters scratched in, as if with a knife.*

day4_lunch_rooftop_3.name: Me
day4_lunch_rooftop_3.text: *'There's only one way out. — Lee Seolhwa' ...Seolhwa left this.*

day4_lunch_end.name: Me
day4_lunch_end.text: *Afternoon classes begin. My heart feels like it's about to burst.*
